title: [MOD] Implement integrated EPS FMU (solar array + battery + PCDU)
body:
## Objective
Build a realistic integrated EPS FMU that models solar array, battery, and PCDU as internally decomposed subsystems behind a clean external interface.

## Inputs
- solar_illumination (0.0 to 1.0)
- load_power (W)

## Outputs
- bus_voltage (V)
- battery_soc (0.0 to 1.0)
- battery_voltage (V)
- generated_power (W)
- charge_current (A)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Non-linear SoC/voltage curve
- Separate charge and discharge efficiency
- Penumbra support (partial illumination)
- FMU authored with pythonfmu
- Builds cleanly via pythonfmu build
- Documented subsystem decomposition in docstring

## Implements
SVF-DEV-060, SVF-DEV-063

title: [ORC] Write EPS test procedures using svf_session fixture
body:
## Objective
Write a complete set of test procedures validating the EPS FMU using the SVF pytest plugin.

## Test Cases
- TC-PWR-001: Battery charges in sunlight
- TC-PWR-002: Battery discharges in eclipse
- TC-PWR-003: Sunlight to eclipse transition
- TC-PWR-004: Partial illumination (penumbra)
- TC-PWR-005: Low battery recovery

## Acceptance Criteria
- All test procedures use svf_session fixture
- Assertions use observe().reaches/exceeds/drops_below().within()
- Commands injected via svf_session.inject()
- All tests pass and CI is green
- ECSS verdicts recorded correctly

## Implements
SVF-DEV-040, SVF-DEV-041, SVF-DEV-042, SVF-DEV-043

title: [SIM] Implement model-to-model wiring via ParameterStore
body:
## Objective
Extend SimulationMaster to wire model outputs to model inputs via the ParameterStore, enabling separate FMUs to communicate without direct coupling.

## Design
SimulationMaster accepts a wiring map at construction:
  wiring = {('solar_array', 'generated_power'): ('pcdu', 'solar_input')}
After each tick, master copies ParameterStore values to CommandStore entries according to the wiring map.

## Acceptance Criteria
- WiringMap type defined
- SimulationMaster accepts optional wiring at construction
- Copying happens after all models tick, before next tick
- Integration test with two connected NativeModelAdapters
- mypy clean

## Implements
SVF-DEV-004

title: [MOD] Decompose integrated EPS into separate Solar, Battery, PCDU FMUs
body:
## Objective
Refactor the integrated EPS FMU into three separate FMUs connected via the model wiring mechanism from SVF-DEV-004.

## Models
- SolarArrayFMU: illumination -> generated_power, array_voltage
- BatteryFMU: charge_current -> battery_voltage, soc, temperature
- PCDUFmu: generated_power + battery_voltage + load -> bus_voltage + charge_current

## Acceptance Criteria
- Three separate pythonfmu FMUs
- Wired together via SimulationMaster wiring map
- Existing EPS test procedures pass unchanged
- SSP file describes the system structure

## Implements
SVF-DEV-004, SVF-DEV-060, SVF-DEV-063

title: [SIM] Add SSP system description support
body:
## Objective
Support SSP (System Structure and Parameterization) files as an alternative to programmatic wiring maps for describing multi-FMU system connections.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SimulationMaster accepts SSP file path
- Parses SSP to derive wiring map
- Integration test with SSP-described EPS system
- SSP file for EPS system committed to examples/

## Implements
SVF-DEV-004
